title: Undergraduate Aerospace Industry Project I
prereqCoreqText: Students must complete a minimum of 24 credits within their respective Engineering program prior to enrolling.

rules.message: Students must complete at least 24.0 credits before taking this course.

title: Undergraduate Aerospace Industry Project II
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously: IADI 301 with a grade of Pass.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: IADI 301.

title: Professional Development and Experiential Learning in Aerospace
